task_description: Redesign and stabilize the application's visual system with a proper theme system (light/dark) using semantic design tokens, smooth 200ms transitions, and premium glassmorphism effects using backdrop-filter blur and saturate. Fix all color inconsistencies across components and ensure correct contrast in both themes.

verification.summary: bun run build succeeds with zero errors. bun run lint passes with zero errors (only 2 pre-existing unused variable warnings that existed before this change). No test suite configured. Review feedback addressed in follow-up commit.
